title: Complimentary Vibrance
description: This pack simply changes how aspects of the game look to become more vibrant, colourful and pleasing to the eye.
body:
![Official Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c343dcb0f2dfefbcb46aeddcfa2aca0163b70e6c.png)Complimentary Vibrance is a simple 1.21.X resource pack which tweaks textures in the game to offer a more pleasing look. Some textures within this pack have been altered to be made more vibrant and colourful, while others have been slightly altered to just be improved aesthetically :)

For example, every gold-related item or model has been upped in saturation to pop more and look more pleasing to the eye. 
![Golden Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1aa42e8256142791caed3bec5667992362e961a4.png)![Golden Chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/642c3abead5d059a211674d1ad83f4a908268e6b.png)![Golden Leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec80baffa06a46b5423db1d83513f039e7834643.png)![Golden Boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98b12d47f252fe5bba797277500725e1330d6333.png)![Gold Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eac8fc5b7a9e8a369d857833175446d50b45128c.png)![Golden Carrots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d592ca921a9d888176153af164ab969e1ed7ddc6.png) Similar effects have been given to diamond and iron gear too!

A different kind of change, however, can be seen within the wooden and stone tool variants, as well as other tools such as the trident. Rather than being saturated, they have instead been tweaked with extra details and colours aesthetically to be more pleasing. ![Wooden Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c987c15e7fdd3ba6b3857b52aadfea21488f9bc.png)![Stone Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b80b811c5eea9f5578e4fb9d463b2698d79f775e.png)![Trident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0852d6df4fcaec4bd36035e07ec34494d34553a3.png)

And finally, other textures have been given slight adjustments to make them less pixely and more aesthetically pleasing all around. Some examples of this is the apple having a green leaf included, and the bow being completely remodeled. ![Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95681240729749cba1697a0489302418017163fe.png)![Bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b5e0937664c0aca54197d2d9c0b5f625f0570ae.png)

No mods are required to use this pack, but there are some minor features that can only be seen using the "Optfine" mod. You can find that here: [https://optifine.net/home](https://optifine.net/home)

Some textures used in this pack such as the smoother wool and sunflower head are from Vanilla Tweaks. You can check out their customizable vanilla-based texture-pack making website here: [https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

This pack will likely not receive many updates, but if you have any suggestions, feel free to join my Discord server here and put them in the qna channel: https://discord.gg/pTTYtcFd74 

Also be sure to support my Youtube Channel! [https://www.youtube.com/@jayymovies](https://www.youtube.com/@jayymovies)
